entities.name: RHIZOBIA
entities.description: Soil bacteria that form symbiotic relationships with legumes to fix nitrogen

entities.name: BRADYRHIZOBIUM
entities.description: Specific genus of rhizobia studied in soybean

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process by which atmospheric nitrogen is converted into ammonia by microorganisms

entities.name: RHIZOBIAL INOCULANTS
entities.description: The application of rhizobia to seeds or soil to enhance nitrogen fixation

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: The pattern of crops grown on a piece of land over time

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The formation of nodules on the roots of legumes by rhizobia

entities.name: IRON CHLOROSIS
entities.description: Iron deficiency in plants, specifically noted in groundnut

entities.name: HOST-PLANTS SELECTION
entities.description: The process of selecting specific plant varieties to improve biological nitrogen fixation
